definitions.usage_example_es: Es una política de la empresa.
definitions.usage_context_en: A course or principle of action adopted or proposed by a government, party, business, or individual.
definitions.usage_context_es: Un curso o principio de acción adoptado o propuesto por un gobierno, partido, negocio o individuo.

definitions.usage_example: She has a life insurance policy.
definitions.usage_example_es: Ella tiene una póliza de seguro de vida.

definitions.usage_context_en: A suggestion or proposal as to the best course of action.
definitions.usage_context_es: Una sugerencia o propuesta sobre el mejor curso de acción.

definitions.usage_example: We created a roadmap for the next year.
definitions.usage_example_es: Creamos una hoja de ruta para el próximo año.
definitions.usage_context_en: A plan that shows the steps toward a goal.
definitions.usage_context_es: A plan that shows the steps toward a goal.

definitions.usage_example: Finishing the prototype was a major milestone.
definitions.usage_example_es: Terminar el prototipo fue un hito importante.
definitions.usage_context_en: An important stage in a process.
definitions.usage_context_es: An important stage in a process.

definitions.usage_example: This document is the blueprint for the project.
definitions.usage_example_es: Este documento es el plan detallado del proyecto.
definitions.usage_context_en: A detailed model or plan to follow.
definitions.usage_context_es: A detailed model or plan to follow.
